title: Moving Google Drive files to different folders when Monday Items change Groups

posts.author: tldl (Alex Arnold)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, does anyone know how to do this using Integromat/Make?

I have three Groups on my Board: In Process, Awaiting Approval, and Ready to Ship.

I have corresponding folder names in Google Drive and would like to move the Google Doc in the first folder into the next folder automatically when the Monday Group is advanced.

I can’t get it to work in Integromat, but have faith that it’s possible. thanks for any help you might offer!
